data.title: Future announced acquisition of SheerLuxe, UK-based digital publishing group combining trusted media brand with creator economy.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, in London, Future declared the acquisition of SheerLuxe, a rapidly expanding digital publishing company located in the UK. This move solidifies Future's position as a top player in specialist media. SheerLuxe brings together the credibility of a well-established media brand with the genuine connection and involvement found in the creator economy. This strategic acquisition marks a significant step for both companies in the industry.
VENEZUELA'S RULING-PARTY CONTROLLED NATIONAL ASSEMBLY BACKS OIL REFORM IN INITIAL VOTE

data.title: Tambourine unveils Tambourine One, a unified solution for hotel websites & booking engine. announced on Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on January 22, 2026, Tambourine introduced Tambourine One, a comprehensive new solution merging their hotel website technology and booking engine. This global leader in hotel marketing technology aims to assist hotels with a single, powerful platform.

data.title: Inventor from Sitka, Alaska creates ergonomic shovel with HANSONS UTILITY HANDLE for easier manipulation.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, an inventor from Sitka, Alaska, discussed the development of a new shovel with an improved handle for easier manipulation. The inventor introduced the HANSONS UTILITY HANDLE, aiming to enhance balance and leverage. This innovation could potentially assist in alleviating common issues faced with traditional shovels.

data.title: CEO: USDC is a neutral layer, not competing with Visa or Mastercard. Jeremy Allaire at Davos mentions Circle's stablecoin.
data.description: During an event in Davos, Jeremy Allaire discussed Circle's stablecoin, highlighting its role as shared infrastructure instead of posing as a threat to traditional banks or card networks.
APPLE’S TIM COOK NOT EXPECTED TO STEP DOWN AS CEO IMMINENTLY

data.title: PMC debuts new Main Monitor models at NAMM 2026, its biggest advancement in 30 years, coinciding with 35th anniversary.
data.description: Responding from Los Angeles on January 22, 2026, during The NAMM Show, PMC unveiled its latest Main Monitor models at NAMM 2026. This release represents a major leap in monitor design, the most notable advancement in over 30 years, and aligns with the celebration of the company's 35th year in operation. This development showcases the company's commitment to innovation and progress in the industry.

data.title: Mark-Taylor Residential ranks No. 1 in 2025 TALi Awards, secures 13 spots in Top 100 nationwide, based in Scottsdale, Arizona.
data.description: A leading multifamily development, management, and consulting company based in Arizona, Mark-Taylor Residential, has obtained 13 positions in the top 100 rankings. The company, headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona, claimed the number one spot in the United States in a recent industry evaluation. The achievement was announced on January 22, 2026.

data.title: Tradeify partners with UFC's Israel Adesanya, who is its Global Brand Ambassador before his fight against Joe Pyfer in UFC Seattle on March 28. This marks the second chapter of Tradeify's Champion Mindset campaign.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, it was announced that Adesanya has been appointed as the Global Brand Ambassador for Tradeify. This news comes as Adesanya prepares to make his return to the octagon against Joe Pyfer at UFC Seattle on March 28. The partnership marks the second phase of Tradeify's Champion Mindset campaign. This collaboration signifies a significant move for both parties, with the exact terms of the deal undisclosed. Adesanya's role as the Global Brand Ambassador is expected to boost Tradeify's visibility on a global scale, capitalizing on his popularity and influence in the world of UFC. This strategic move aligns with Tradeify's efforts to promote their brand and services to a wider audience, leveraging Adesanya's reputation as a UFC icon.

data.title: iboss upgrades AI-powered SSPM to identify SaaS misconfigurations, improving Zero Trust strategies in cloud security.
data.description: In Orlando, Florida on January 22, 2026, iboss announced the release of their AI-Powered SSPM capability. This technology is designed to analyze SaaS applications through API on an ongoing basis to identify misconfigurations, enhance Zero Trust strategies, and reduce the risk of breaches. iboss is a prominent provider of Zero Trust Secure Access Service Edge (SASE) cloud security solutions.

data.title: Bullish appoints Lindsay Kaplan as Venture Partner to support new consumer brands, highlighting growth strategy.
data.description: Today, on January 22, 2026, Bullish, a renowned early-stage venture capital and marketing company recognized for its unique combination of capital, consulting, and creativity, revealed that Lindsay Kaplan has been appointed as a Venture Partner. This move highlights Bullish's ongoing growth and commitment to expanding its team with talent.

data.title: Exco Technologies Limited 2025 Annual Meeting: 66.0% voted; all director nominees elected.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, Exco Technologies Limited (TSX-XTC) disclosed the outcomes of its 2025 annual shareholders meeting in Toronto. A significant portion, 66.0%, equivalent to 25,042,054 Common Shares of the total issued and outstanding Common Shares, were cast during the meeting. Following the proxies received before the session, all director nominees were elected with substantial majorities.

data.title: Janux Therapeutics and Bristol Myers sign $800M biotech deal, $50M upfront, aiming for novel immunotherapies.
data.description: Janux Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: JANX) has signed an exclusive worldwide license and collaboration agreement with Bristol Myers Squibb Co. (NYSE: BMY) worth up to $800 million, including an upfront payment of $50 million and potential milestone payments. The collaboration involves development of immunotherapies targeting solid tumors, with Janux completing preclinical development up to FDA IND submission, after which Bristol Myers Squibb will take over. This marks a significant milestone for Janux, validating the strength of its tumor-activated platforms. The agreement is expected to enhance Janux's capabilities and support Bristol Myers Squibb through the Phase 1 clinical study.

data.title: New Dogecoin ETF (TDOG) launched on Nasdaq with Dogecoin Foundation backing. DOGE is down 54% since September, showing zero institutional demand.
data.description: The first spot Dogecoin ETF, 21Shares Dogecoin ETF (NASDAQ: TDOG), was launched on Nasdaq with backing from the Dogecoin Foundation. Despite this, the value of DOGE has dropped by 54% since September. Other existing ETFs have shown no institutional demand for DOGE. TDOG stands out as it has received explicit SEC approval, setting it apart from previous products by Grayscale and Bitwise. Unlike its predecessors, TDOG holds Dogecoin on a 1:1 basis in institutional-grade custody and charges a 0.50% management fee. Investors have the option to access DOGE exposure through traditional brokerage services.

data.title: Global Voices gather in Arizona for first SkyFire Environmental Film Festival, showcasing films from worldwide, establishing Arizona as a hub for environmental storytelling and action. Screens in top Phoenix venues. Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: The SkyFire Environmental Film Festival in Phoenix on January 22, 2026, showcases submissions from global participants and screens films at various prominent venues in the area. Demonstrating Arizona as a center for environmental narratives, the festival signifies a step towards raising awareness and promoting action.

data.title: ICAT Logistics reveals new brand identity to support growth; consolidates vertical divisions.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, in Dallas, ICAT Logistics revealed the introduction of its fresh brand identity, marking a significant milestone in the company's development. The updated brand brings together ICAT's various divisions under one cohesive platform to cater to intricate and high-stakes operations effectively.

data.title: iQmetrix to host First Telecom Retail Summit at MWC Barcelona 2026, redefining telecom and retail intersection.
data.description: At a summit during MWC Barcelona 2026, iQmetrix is shaking up the traditional norms by redefining the merging point of telecom and retail experience.

data.title: "RXNT's EHR-PM software named top in 2026 PPMS report, 2nd year in a row. Highlights leading system. Annopolis, Md., Jan 22, 2026"
data.description: RXNT's fully integrated EHR-PM system has been recognized for the second consecutive time as one of the Top 20 Physician Practice Management Software solutions, showcasing the company's leading position in the industry. The accolade was given to RXNT by healthcare technology pioneer on January 22, 2026, in Annapolis, Maryland. This recognition underscores RXNT's commitment to providing a feature-rich platform that combines electronic health records and practice management seamlessly. The consecutive acknowledgment solidifies RXNT's status as a key player in the sector, with its system standing out among competitors.

data.title: NOW! Programs® reports 2025 student outcomes, emphasizing literacy skills for workforce and academic success.
data.description: Recently, NOW! Programs® showcased the outcomes of 2025 students in academic and workforce paths. The organization, established by Dr. Tim Conway, PhD, as CEO, announced these nationally recognized results in Jacksonville, Florida on January 22, 2026. The report emphasized the importance of foundational education in the success of students.
